name: Another Door: Escape Room
summary:
Use Your Wits To Escape!

Another Door is a VR escape room experience that plunges you into a series of immersive, unsettling environments, each with its own unique story and chilling challenges. From a trap-filled lair built by a mad scientist, to a h4unted doll's room cursed by the spirit of a dead child, and a secret laboratory where hallucinations blur reality, every episode delivers a fresh and thrilling mystery!
